title: rubus × pseudoaviicola
intro: Rubus × pseudoacacia, also known as the Blackthorn or Sloe, is a hybrid of the Blackthorn (Rubus fruticosus) and the Red-berried Blackthorn (Rubus laciniatus). This thorny shrub is valued for its medicinal properties, including its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × pseudoacacia include its ability to help alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an antibacterial agent, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Rubus × pseudoacacia include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
